ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jon Vaught appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court questions why Counsel hasn't filed a petition for final distribution. Mr. Vaught stated that the he has the petition, that he is putting the final touches on it and that he expects to have it filed in the next couple of days. Status on close of estate is continued to October 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Continued To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Continued To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Continued To Sep-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jodi Phillips appeared by zoom for Phillip McFadden (Administrator).

Ms. Phillips stated that the delay was because escrow did not close until this past Friday and that escrow has instructions to wire transfer the proceeds to each of the four blocked accounts that were opened. Ms. Phillips also stated that they have proof of the accounts being opened, but not the receipts for the deposits, that they hope to have the receipts by the end of this week and that once they get the receipts, they will begin drafting the petition for final distribution. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is continued to September 2, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (47 Miramar Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jodi Phillips appeared by Zoom for Phillip McFadden (Petitioner).
Cara Milgate Agent for the Seller appeared by Zoom.
Amy Li Agent for the Buyer appeared by Zoom.

Ms. Phillips stated that posting has been taken care of. The sale was confirmed at $1,025,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is set for August 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (47 Miramar Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Jul-15-2020 Continued To Jul-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jodi Phillips appeared by Zoom for Phillip McFadden.
Amy Li (Agent for the Buyer) appeared by Zoom.
Cara Milgate (Agent for the Seller) appeared by telephone.

The Court informed the parties that notice of the sale was not posted by the Clerk's office, that it can't proceed with the sale today and that it can continue the matter for one week. Ms. Phillips stated that they mailed a copy of the notice of sale on June 29, 2020 requesting that the Clerk post it, and asked how she could confirm that the notice is going to be posted. The Court Clerk provided Ns. Phillips with the Probate Supervisor's contact information to seek assistance. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is continued to July 22, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Jude: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
